```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.5em;">the plumbing</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;display:flex;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:0.85em;">📁</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;">file-based comms</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Files survive resets.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;display:flex;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:0.85em;">📄</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;">structured handoffs</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;"><code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;font-size:0.95em;">SPEC.md</code> · <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#5654A2;font-size:0.95em;">REVIEW.md</code></div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;display:flex;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:0.85em;">⎇</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;">version control</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Every checkpoint = a commit. Rewindable.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;display:flex;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:0.85em;">📜</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;">sprint contracts</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Define "done" <strong>before</strong> work starts.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;display:flex;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);grid-column:1 / -1;">
   <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:0.85em;">🔌</div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;">interactive testing tools</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Playwright · HTTP · DB MCPs — <strong>use</strong> the output, don't just read it.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
